title: Risk Analyst
description: We're hiring a Risk Analyst at Bain & Company. This is an exciting opportunity to join our intellectually rigorous, client-obsessed, elite team and make a direct impact on our mission. If you have 2-4 years years of experience and are passionate about Management Consulting, we'd love to hear from you.
responsibilities: Conduct comprehensive risk assessments across business units and identify mitigation strategies
Develop and maintain risk frameworks and documentation for regulatory compliance
Monitor emerging market and operational risks, presenting findings to senior leadership
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to integrate risk management into strategic initiatives
Create detailed risk reports with actionable recommendations and implementation timelines
Evaluate vendor and third-party risk profiles before partnership engagement

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Finance, Business, Economics, or related field
